description: Implement the tutorial experience in the Docking Ring sector. The first run guides the player through basic mechanics (movement, combat, item pickup, resource management, stashing) without feeling like a heavy-handed tutorial.
acceptance_criteria: The first run starts in a simplified Docking Ring layout with fewer rooms and weaker enemies.
Context-sensitive tooltip messages appear for first-time actions: first move, first item pickup, first combat, first terminal interaction, first stash interaction.
Tooltips are non-blocking — they appear as message log entries or brief overlay text that auto-dismiss after 3 seconds.
A tutorial flag is stored in persistence — the tutorial only triggers on the very first run.
The Docking Ring sector always serves as the starting sector for every run (tutorial or not).
After the tutorial run (whether the player survives or dies), subsequent runs skip tutorial messages.
notes: Spec: 'First-run guided experience in Docking Ring.' Keep it light — roguelike players hate heavy tutorials. Message log tips are the least intrusive approach.
